SuSiE report

Darren Cameron

2025-10-05

SuSiE finemapping pipeline steps

  1. get_sig_eGenes: Get sig. eGenes per cell type from TensorQTL perm output
  2. prep_susie_gene_meta: Create gene metadata file per cell type for SuSiE
  3. vcf_to_dosage: Generate a allele dosage file from genotypes VCF for SuSiE
  4. prep_susie_input: Extract genotype, expression, and covariate data per cell type for SuSiE fine-mapping
  5. run_susie: Run SuSiE fine-mapping per cell type
  6. merge_susie: Merge SuSiE fine-mapping output into a single file per cell type
  7. sort_susie: Sort SuSiE fine-mapping output
  8. susie_report: Summarise SuSiE results
